finding_results.notes: Varied the spell-nullification beat and Miren-recognition beat into different sentence shapes while preserving the earlier substrate correction and the later substrate-structure break. The chapter now keeps two corrective-negation beats instead of four.

summary: Revised chapter 17 locally to resolve the pass-scoped prose tic by varying two of the four recurring corrective-negation beats while preserving voice, scene pressure, and the chapter's core refusal.
